licenseStatementSeen: polyhaven-license-page.txt (all Poly Haven assets are CC0)
author: Rob Tuytel (scanning, processing); Rico Cilliers (cleanup, processing)
notes: Phase 7 copse/orchard tree. ADR 0002: the raw 2k FBX scan source (32 MB, ~1.07 M tris) is NOT committed — it is fetch-reproducible from the recorded URL+sha256. The committed asset is a project-derived optimization: bpy Decimate(collapse) to 60,000 tris exported as island_tree_02_decimated.fbx (deterministic script, scratchpad decimate_trees.py pattern recorded here), plus 1k diffuse maps only (trunk atlas jpg unmodified; branches png re-encoded to JPEG q90 — no alpha needed; leaves RGBA png unmodified, alpha in A channel). Normal/rough/AO maps intentionally dropped: the tree renders at >=80 m in the gate frames. downloadSha256 is the sha256 OF downloads.sha256 (multi-file acquisition).
